subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-16 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: I speak according to the demands of the time and the capacity of my listeners. 'The father makes gurgling sounds for the newborn infant, although his wisdom be capable of measuring the universe.'
subcodes.first_line_orig: نطقهای من همه باقتضای وقت و اندازهٴ استعداد نفوس است بهر طفلک آن پدر تی تی کند گر چه عقلش هندسهٴ گیتی کند
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @relativity of religious truth, @wisdom [hikmat], @development of capacity and readiness, @differences in human capacity
